name: huo-server
description: Heads Up Omaha — server-side game engine

scripts.parity: npx tsx tests/parity_emit.ts 42 10000 > /tmp/ts_parity.txt && python tests/parity_ref.py 42 10000 > /tmp/py_parity.txt && diff /tmp/ts_parity.txt /tmp/py_parity.txt && echo 'PARITY OK: 0 diffs across 10k hands'
scripts.parity:trips: npx tsx tests/parity_emit.ts 42 10000 trips > /tmp/ts_parity.txt && python tests/parity_ref.py 42 10000 trips > /tmp/py_parity.txt && diff /tmp/ts_parity.txt /tmp/py_parity.txt && echo 'PARITY OK (trips): 0 diffs across 10k hands'

author: Clawbyte Ltd
